# CDEP Stats ‚Äî Camera Deputa»õilor Rom√¢nia

Site: https://lab.gov2.ro/cdep/
Source: https://github.com/gov2-ro/cdep-stats
License: Open Government License v3.0
Data origin: www.cdep.ro (public data of the Romanian Chamber of Deputies)

This is NOT an official Government of Romania project.

## Page index

### Landing & dashboards

| Page | URL | Params | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| Home | `index.html` | ‚Äî | Precomputed counts, recent votes, top deputies. Loads `data/v1/stats/home-2024.json`. |
| Wealth dashboard | `avere.html` | `?leg=2024` | Top wealth, income, debt; party breakdowns. |
| County comparison | `judete.html` | `?leg=2024` | Choropleth map + rankings per jude»õ: activity, wealth, attendance. |
| Party comparison | `partide.html` | `?leg=2024` | Side-by-side party stats: wealth, activity, attendance. |

### Deputies

| Page | URL | Params | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| Deputy profile | `deputat.html` | `?id={cdep_idm}&leg=2024` | Full profile: party, county, commissions, activity (sessions, speeches, bills, promulgated laws, interpellations), wealth summary, interests. Links to `vot.html` for votes. |
| Activity viz | `deputati-activitate.html` | `?leg=2024` | Bubble chart: each deputy as a circle sized by activity (attendance, bills, interpellations). |
| Wealth viz | `deputati-avere.html` | `?leg=2024` | Bubble chart: each deputy as a circle sized by declared wealth, income, properties, debt. |
| Interests | `interese.html` | `?leg=2024` | Declara»õii de interese: companies, party roles, public contracts. |

### Legislative activity

| Page | URL | Params | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| Bills stats | `proiecte-stats.html` | `?leg=2024` | Aggregate bill statistics: by status, initiator, timeline. |
| Bill detail | `proiect.html` | `?idp={idp}&leg=2024` | Single bill: title, initiator, status (in progress / adopted / promulgated / rejected), procedural timeline, amendments, cross-link to final vote. |
| Agenda calendar | `ordine-zi.html` | `?leg=2024[&year=YYYY]` | Calendar view of plenary sessions with entity badges (law type, urgency, commissions) and filter bar (Toate / Proiecte lege / HotƒÉr√¢ri / Mo»õiuni / Procedural). |
| Session detail | `sesiune.html` | `?date=YYYY-MM-DD&leg=2024` | Single plenary session: full agenda with entity tags, commission chips, document links. |
| Votes list | `voturi.html` | `?leg=2024` | All votes for a legislature. |
| Vote detail | `vot.html` | `?id={cdep_idv}&leg=2024` | Single vote: description, nominal breakdown per deputy, party cohesion. Cross-link to bill via `bill-vote-map`. |
| Motions | `motiuni.html` | ‚Äî | 162 simple motions (1992‚Äì2024). |

### Other

| Page | URL | Params | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| Commissions | `comisii.html` | `?leg=2024` | 37 permanent and special commissions with membership and party distribution. |
| Interpellations | `interpelari-stats.html` | `?leg=2024` | 9,758 interpellations and written questions: per deputy, per ministry, response rate. |
| Party profile | `partid.html` | `?id={party_slug}&leg=2024` | Single party: wealth stats, activity stats, deputy roster. |

## Cross-links between pages

- `index.html` ‚Üí `deputat.html?id={cdep_idm}`, `vot.html?id={cdep_idv}&leg=2024`
- `deputat.html` ‚Üí `vot.html?id={cdep_idv}&leg=2024` (per vote), `partid.html?id={slug}&leg=2024`
- `proiect.html` ‚Üí `vot.html?id={cdep_idv}&leg=2024` (final vote, via `bill-vote-map`)
- `partid.html` ‚Üí `deputat.html?id={cdep_idm}` (per deputy in roster)
- `ordine-zi.html` ‚Üí `sesiune.html?date={date}&leg=2024` (click a session day)
- `sesiune.html` ‚Üí `proiect.html?idp={idp}&leg=2024` (per agenda item with idp)
- `judete.html` ‚Üí `deputat.html?id={cdep_idm}` (per deputy in county detail)

## Data files (JSON)

All data served from `/cdep/data/v1/`. Legislature values: `2024`, `2020`, `2016` (partial).

### Deputies
- `deputati/legislatura-{leg}.json` ‚Äî all deputies with aggregated activity

### Votes
- `voturi/{leg}/_index.json` ‚Äî vote index with totals
- `voturi/{leg}/{cdep_idv}.json` ‚Äî single vote with nominal breakdown

### Bills
- `proiecte/legislatura-{leg}/{year}.json` ‚Äî bills by year
- `stats/bill-vote-map-{leg}.json` ‚Äî bill‚Üívote cross-reference (pre-joined at build time)
- `stats/proiecte-{leg}.json` ‚Äî aggregate bill stats
- `stats/proiecte-index-{leg}.json` ‚Äî thin bill index

### Wealth & interests
- `declaratii-avere/legislatura-{leg}/{cdep_idm}.json` ‚Äî wealth declaration per deputy
- `declaratii-interese/legislatura-{leg}/{cdep_idm}.json` ‚Äî interest declaration per deputy
- `declaratii-interese/legislatura-{leg}.json` ‚Äî index
- `stats/avere-{leg}.json` ‚Äî aggregate wealth stats by party
- `stats/avere-deputies-{leg}.json` ‚Äî per-deputy wealth stats
- `stats/avere-context-{leg}.json` ‚Äî contextual aggregates (national avg, etc.)

### Activity
- `stats/activitate-deputies-{leg}.json` ‚Äî per-deputy activity stats
- `stats/interpelari-{leg}.json` ‚Äî aggregate interpellation stats

### Other
- `comisii/legislatura-{leg}.json` ‚Äî commissions with membership
- `interpelari/legislatura-{leg}.json` ‚Äî interpellations
- `motiuni/legislatura-{leg}.json` ‚Äî motions
- `ordine-zi/legislatura-{leg}.json` ‚Äî plenary agendas with extracted entities
- `stats/home-{leg}.json` ‚Äî precomputed counts for landing page
- `correspondence/monitorul_idm_lookup.json` ‚Äî cdep_idm ‚Üí monitorul.ai ID mapping
- `feed.json`, `feed.atom` ‚Äî activity feeds

## Entity extraction (ordine-zi)

Agenda items in `ordine-zi/legislatura-{leg}.json` include an `entities` field with:
- `item_type` ‚Äî document type (30 values: proiect_lege, proiect_hotarare, propunere_legislativa, reexaminare, motiune_simpla, ‚Ä¶)
- `action` ‚Äî legislative verb (aprobare_oug, modificare_si_completare, completare, ‚Ä¶)
- `law_category` ‚Äî lege_organica / lege_ordinara
- `flags` ‚Äî procedural indicators (procedura_urgenta, camera_decizionala, rezerva_raport, ‚Ä¶)
- `referenced_acts` ‚Äî OUG, OG, Lege, Hotarare, CCR with nr/year
- `commissions` ‚Äî parliamentary commissions mentioned
- `initiator_group`, `initiator_count`, `initiator_type` ‚Äî for motions
- `subject` ‚Äî topical noun phrase (what the item is about)
- `senate_adoption_date` ‚Äî date adopted by Senate

Extraction is pure regex (`scrapers/entities_ordine_zi.py`). See `docs/ordine-zi-entity-analysis.md` for full taxonomy and n-gram analysis.

## Build pipeline

1. Scrapers fetch raw data from cdep.ro: `run_deputati.py`, `run_voturi.py`, `run_interpelari.py`
2. Derived builds aggregate and cross-reference: `build_comisii.py`, `build_amendamente.py`, `build_feeds.py`, `build_declaratii_avere.py`, `build_avere_stats.py`, `build_home_stats.py`, `build_proiecte_index.py`, `build_ordine_zi_entities.py`
3. Validation: `validate_data.py`
4. Analysis: `analyze_ngrams.py` ‚Äî n-gram frequency analysis for pattern discovery
5. Deploy: `build_web.py` produces `deploy.zip`; `deploy.sh` for rsync
